### 2370. `POST` `/api/v1/mitre/map`

**Summary:** Map findings to MITRE ATT&CK techniques

**Tags:** MITRE ATT&CK Coverage

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Map a list of security findings to MITRE ATT&CK v14 techniques.  Uses CWE ID matching (highest
confidence) and keyword matching on title/description. Returns per-finding technique lists sorted by
confidence (HIGH → MED → LOW).

**Request Body:** `MapRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `findings` | List | Yes |  | Findings to map (max 500) |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 2371. `POST` `/api/v1/mitre/coverage`

**Summary:** ATT&CK coverage report for a set of findings

**Tags:** MITRE ATT&CK Coverage

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Calculate ATT&CK matrix coverage across all provided findings.  Returns the percentage of techniques
and tactics covered, a per-tactic breakdown, and technique frequency counts.

**Request Body:** `CoverageRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `findings` | List | Yes |  |  |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 2372. `POST` `/api/v1/mitre/gaps`

**Summary:** ATT&CK techniques not covered by current findings

**Tags:** MITRE ATT&CK Coverage

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Identify ATT&CK techniques not covered by any finding.  Pass the set of technique IDs already
detected. Returns uncovered techniques sorted by real-world prevalence (HIGH priority first).

**Request Body:** `GapsRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `covered_technique_ids` | List | Yes |  | Technique IDs already covered (e.g. ['T1190', 'T1059']) |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 2373. `POST` `/api/v1/mitre/heatmap`

**Summary:** ATT&CK Navigator heatmap data from findings

**Tags:** MITRE ATT&CK Coverage

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate ATT&CK Navigator layer JSON from security findings.  The returned JSON conforms to ATT&CK
Navigator layer schema v4.5 and can be imported at https://mitre-attack.github.io/attack-navigator/

**Request Body:** `HeatmapRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `findings` | List | Yes |  |  |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 2397. `POST` `/api/v1/offline-feed/ingest`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/offline-feed/ingest

**Tags:** offline-feed

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Ingest an air-gapped threat-intel bundle (.tar.gz).  Delegates to
`ThreatIntelFusionEngine.ingest_offline_bundle()`, which verifies sha256 hashes in MANIFEST.json and
applies TI entries as fusion indicators.

**Request Body:** `IngestRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `bundle_path` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `verify` | bool | No | True |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 2401. `GET` `/api/v1/greynoise/lookup/{ip}`

**Summary:** GreyNoise Community IP Lookup

**Tags:** GreyNoise Community Intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Look up a single IP address against the GreyNoise Community API. Results are cached in memory for 5
minutes and persisted to the local greynoise.db store for 24 hours. Set GREYNOISE_API_KEY in the
environment to use the paid tier.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `ip` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 2402. `POST` `/api/v1/greynoise/import-known-ips`

**Summary:** Bulk GreyNoise IP Import

**Tags:** GreyNoise Community Intel

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Submit a list of IP addresses for bulk GreyNoise community lookups. Each IP is checked against the
local 24-hour cache before hitting the API. Results are persisted to data/greynoise.db. Returns
lookup counts and classification breakdown.

**Request Body:** `List`

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error
